title: hedypnois aculeata
intro: Hedypnois aculeata, also known as prickly cat's thyme or prickly thyme, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hedypnois aculeata include its ability to reduce stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hedypnois aculeata can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and other health concerns.
